deception_tactics.alpha: Overstate interest in water_release_volume (claim to prefer Low volume strongly) to later concede it for better payment terms.
deception_tactics.beta: Overstate interest in payment_structure (claim to prefer Heavy-Downstream payment) to trade for higher water release volume.
deception_tactics.gamma: Overstate interest in payment_structure (claim to prefer Token payment) to gain concessions on long-term infrastructure funding.

issues.description: Monthly water release volume from Alpha's dam during the agreement period.
issues.name: water_release_volume

issues.description: Compensation scheme for Alpha's lost hydro and fishing revenues.
issues.name: payment_structure

issues.description: Long-term infrastructure investment and funding during the agreement.
issues.name: long_term_infrastructure

logrolling: Alpha concedes on water_release_volume by agreeing to Medium or High release in exchange for Heavy-Downstream payment structure from Gamma and Beta.
Beta accepts Shared or Heavy-Downstream payment to secure High water_release_volume necessary for irrigation.
Gamma agrees to Heavy-Downstream payment and High water_release_volume in exchange for Alpha and Beta supporting Joint-Funded Desalination infrastructure.
Alpha supports Joint-Funded Desalination to reduce long-term pressure on water releases, conceding infrastructure preferences to Gamma.
Beta concedes infrastructure issue (prefers Joint-Funded but willing to accept Deferred) in exchange for better water volume and token or shared payment.
